\section{Professional Summary}
Backend engineer with 4+ years of experience designing and implementing scalable, high-throughput microservices for payment processing and data pipelines. Proficient in Python, Go, and cloud-native technologies, with a strong focus on distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and system reliability. Passionate about building robust solutions and mentoring teams.
